description: Product Description Previous page FIT MANY OCCASIONS Next page Our 6 pairs ultra low cut liner socks made from 80% premium cotton, it is soft, breathe, durable, stretchable. The special technology to make sure the women no show socks is wear resistant. Anti-slip Design Silicone grip on the back heel keep the ultra no show socks in place all day without slipping off or sliding down, and prevent blisters from rubbing. Natural Cotton Socks Cotton are skin-friendly and can help soothe skin, cover feet well. They're more firm than nylon, lace no show socks. Comfortable & Stable Fit Size: One size fit UK size 3 to 8. Main Material: 80% premium combed cotton Package included: 6 pairs no shows women socks. No Show Socks Designed to be invisible flats socks, it gives a sockless appearance after wearing with shoes.It's comfortable,elegant with good practicality. Wash Instruction: It is better to wash women footies socks on delicate in cold water and air dry to maintain the stickiness of the plastic patch on heel, do not dry clean, iron, bleach.
